message:
test(fcp-raptorq): add golden-vector round-trip test suite for decoder verification

Add a golden test vectors module and round-trip decode tests that verify
the RaptorQ decoder produces correct output for known input payloads.

crates/fcp-raptorq/src/golden.rs (new):
- GoldenRoundTrip struct holding source data, encoded symbols, and
  expected decoded output for deterministic round-trip verification
- Static test data covering representative payload sizes and symbol
  configurations to catch decoder regressions

crates/fcp-raptorq/src/decode.rs:
- New #[cfg(test)] mod golden_tests with tests that feed golden-vector
  encoded symbols through the decoder and assert the output matches
  expected plaintext byte-for-byte

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
